title: stelis macrantha
intro: Stelis macrantha is a species of orchid found in the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its showy and fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis macrantha include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Stelis macrantha is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential interactions with other medications.
